title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz General

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz General
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz General in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz General:
Bajaj Allianz General is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General!
